LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DENIED. A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS FILED ON FEBRUARY 5, 2014. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER TO SERVE DEFENDANTS WITH THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND TO FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE WITH THE COURT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Mnt And Mtn For Dismissal Of Pltf'S Complaint And Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT'S Motion For Dismissal Of Plaintiff's Complaint And Entry Of Judgment is denied. A First Amended Complaint was filed on February 5, 2014. Plaintiff is required within 10 days of entry of this order to serve Defendants with the First Amended Complaint and to file a proof of service with the Court. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Off Calendar Feb-05-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - JOMO COLE, TEL. NO. (510) 223-7297, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. TIM FAMA, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3921 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained, with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
